'''zadasa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:uie|uie]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-d-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:uie|uie]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| zadasa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zædæsæth|zædæsæth]] || [[word:zædæsæj|zædæsæj]] || [[word:zædæsæsh|zædæsæsh]] || [[word:zædæsæ|zædæsæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zadadasath|zadadasath]] || [[word:zadadasaj|zadadasaj]] || [[word:zadadasash|zadadasash]] || [[word:zadadasa|zadadasa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zadasath|zadasath]] || [[word:zadasaj|zadasaj]] || [[word:zadasash|zadasash]] || [[word:zadasa|zadasa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zadafsath|zadafsath]] || [[word:zadafsaj|zadafsaj]] || [[word:zadafsash|zadafsash]] || [[word:zadafsaf|zadafsaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zadasatha|zadasatha]] || [[word:zadasaja|zadasaja]] || [[word:zadasasha|zadasasha]] || [[word:zadasaka|zadasaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zadasath|zadasath]] || [[word:zadasaj|zadasaj]] || [[word:zadasash|zadasash]] || [[word:zadasa|zadasa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zadasathal|zadasathal]] || [[word:zadasajal|zadasajal]] || [[word:zadasashal|zadasashal]] || [[word:zadasakal|zadasakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zadasathatha|zadasathatha]] || [[word:zadasajaja|zadasajaja]] || [[word:zadasashasha|zadasashasha]] || [[word:zadasaka|zadasaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zadasathan|zadasathan]] || [[word:zadasajan|zadasajan]] || [[word:zadasashan|zadasashan]] || [[word:zadasakan|zadasakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zadasathaoro|zadasathaoro]] || [[word:zadasajaoro|zadasajaoro]] || [[word:zadasashaoro|zadasashaoro]] || [[word:zadasakaoro|zadasakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|28ebc72}}
